testcase.name: test_admin_all_schools_students_have_school_id_and_name

failure.message: AssertionError: missing school_name on student 62b43fd8-0040-460a-b3e7-ae0557a4112e (school_id=operational-diary) assert '' + where '' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf807d42df100>('school_name') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf807d42df100> = {'birth_date': '2015-01-01', 'class_name': '', 'contact': '', 'full_name': 'Teste Final Dup', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bf_all_schools.py:67: in test_admin_all_schools_students_have_school_id_and_name assert s.get("school_name"), f"missing school_name on student {s.get('id')} (school_id={s.get('school_id')})" E AssertionError: missing school_name on student 62b43fd8-0040-460a-b3e7-ae0557a4112e (school_id=operational-diary) E assert '' E + where '' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf807d42df100>('school_name') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf807d42df100> = {'birth_date': '2015-01-01', 'class_name': '', 'contact': '', 'full_name': 'Teste Final Dup', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_admin_class_id_ignored_in_all_schools_mode

failure.message: AssertionError: class_id must be ignored in all-schools mode; totals diverge assert 1 == 6

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bf_all_schools.py:104: in test_admin_class_id_ignored_in_all_schools_mode assert r_with_class.json()["total"] == r_no_class.json()["total"], ( E AssertionError: class_id must be ignored in all-schools mode; totals diverge E assert 1 == 6
